description_long: This handbag features a structured, rectangular body with a prominent geometric diamond pattern in black and beige across its front and top surfaces. The front flap is secured by a metallic clasp and a decorative round button, adding both function and visual interest. The bag is equipped with a long, adjustable black strap, allowing it to be worn over the shoulder or across the body. The sides and base are solid black, providing contrast to the patterned areas. The overall construction appears to be of synthetic leather or coated fabric, with a semi-gloss finish that gives it a slightly reflective quality. The bag is compact, suitable for carrying personal items in an urban environment.
description: A compact, rectangular handbag with a black and beige geometric diamond pattern, metallic clasp, and a long adjustable black strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned flap, metallic clasp, round button, and the full width of the strap.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the bag's depth, solid black side panel, and the attachment of the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuation of the geometric pattern and the back of the clasp and button.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid black panel and strap attachment, mirroring the other side.
attribute_strap_type: Single long adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap, attached at both sides with loops.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front metallic clasp with a decorative round button on a flap closure.
attribute_decorative_elements: Decorative round button on the flap; metallic clasp.
attribute_pattern: Black and beige geometric diamond pattern.
